data.name: Hentai Furry Bunny
data.detailed_description:
🎰 Hentai Furry Bunny 是一款設在豪華賭場中的 性感紳士拼圖遊戲，主角是一位 魅惑兔女荷官！♠️♥️ 她調情、發牌、挑戰你的運氣……只有完成所有拼圖的人，才能看到她最火辣的私密時刻！🔥



✨ 遊戲特色：
💖 30 個辣味關卡 — 展現兔女郎的各種性感姿態！
🏆 30 個成就 — 收集這間紳士賭場的所有獎勵！
🖼️ 圖庫模式 — 一次欣賞全部已解鎖插畫！

🎚️ 難度選項：

  • 簡單 — 快速享受快感！

  • 普通 — 刺激你的欲望與幸運！

  • 困難 — 一邊挑戰，一邊脫光兔女郎 😉


🎶 賭場風格輕音樂 营造出奢華與誘惑的氛圍！🃏🎧

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Furry Bunny
data.detailed_description:
🎰 Hentai Furry Bunny is a seductive hentai puzzle game set in a luxurious casino with a sexy bunny dealer! ♠️♥️ She flirts, deals chips, and plays with your luck… But only those who complete every piece of this erotic puzzle will witness her hottest NSFW moments! 🔥



✨ Game features:
💖 30 spicy levels — each revealing a new erotic side of the bunny!
🏆 30 achievements — collect all prizes from this hentai casino!
🖼️ Gallery — enjoy all the unlocked illustrations in one place!

🎚️ Difficulty levels:

  • Easy — for quick pleasure!

  • Normal — warm up your lust and luck!

  • Hard — challenge yourself and undress the bunny... piece by piece 😉


🎶 Lounge-style casino music sets the mood of luxury, temptation, and sweet seduction! 🃏🎧
